Topic: WhatsApp AI agent for sizing & fit FAQs
Caption:
Day 1 of 50 Days AI Automation for D2C Brands 🚀

"Will this fit me?" eats up half your DM time. A trained WhatsApp AI agent answers sizing and fit questions instantly, in English and Hindi, using your product catalog.

#D2C #AI #CustomerSupport #WhatsAppAutomation

Topic: 24/7 AI agent for after-hours DMs & emails
Caption:
Day 2 of 50 Days AI Automation for D2C Brands 🚀

Your customers shop at midnight, but your team logs off at 7pm. A 24/7 AI chat agent picks up every Instagram DM and email overnight, so nothing slips through.

#D2C #AI #CustomerSupport #Automation

Topic: Order-status lookup bot via courier APIs
Caption:
Day 3 of 50 Days AI Automation for D2C Brands 🚀

Topic: AI voice agent confirming COD orders before dispatch
Caption:
